name: context-os
description: Context optimization layer for Claude Code. Static-analysis RAG via UserPromptSubmit hook — Claude's first turn starts with file:line candidates from a pre-built repo graph (no embeddings, no server). Live `claude --print` A/B on 36 real calls: −40.9% aggregate tokens [CI 32.7%, 48.9%], 6/6 wins, p=5e-7, Cohen's d=1.84. Offline MRR 0.969 across Python/TS/Rust (+0.094 over BM25-symbols). Dogfood on this repo: MRR 0.800, top-1 0.667 — beats all 5 lexical baselines (+0.181 MRR over BM25-symbols on real-repo prompts). p99 hook latency 173ms at 10,000 files. 18/18 robustness cases pass. Eleven slash commands, six Python hooks (auto_context, prewarm+autobuild, dedup, loop, file-size, session-profile). 28 techniques, one installer.
